heading: Grants to States for threat assessment databases
label: 41508 Grants to States for threat assessment databases
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 3714a of Title 42

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Attorney General, through the Office of Justice Programs, shall make grants under this section to the highest State courts in States participating in the program, for the purpose of enabling such courts to establish and maintain a threat assessment database described in subsection (b).
analyze trends and patterns in domestic terrorism and crime;
project the probabilities that specific acts of domestic terrorism or crime will occur; and
develop measures and procedures that can effectively reduce the probabilities that those acts will occur.

children.heading: Core elements
children.label: c Core elements
children.text: The Attorney General shall define a core set of data elements to be used by each database funded by this section so that the information in the database can be effectively shared with other States and with the Department of Justice.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $15,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2008 through 2011.
